change_summary.encode_change: Encode() now also writes binary.LittleEndian.PutUint64(buf[offVersion:], n.Version) for both LeafNode and InternalNode
change_summary.decode_change: decodeHeader() now returns (nodeType, keyCount, version, err); DecodeLeafNode/DecodeInternalNode thread version into the returned struct's Version field
change_summary.size_accounting: leafEncodedSize/internalEncodedSize unaffected in code (they key off offBody, which is now 11), so needed > NodeSize capacity checks are automatically correct with no separate edit needed

test_changes: leaf round-trip: 'many keys' case now sets Version: 99 (was previously always zero-value)
internal round-trip: 'many keys' case now sets Version: 7

new subtest 'decode rejects mismatched node type': encodes a LeafNode and feeds bytes to DecodeInternalNode (expects error), and encodes an InternalNode and feeds bytes to DecodeLeafNode (expects error)
